source.note: Staging has intentionally not been rebuilt after recent merged PRs; values are design samples and availability evidence, not post-rollout final analytics.

governanceMechanism.label: Forum → Snapshot → Onchain
governanceMechanism.summary: Ideas are discussed in the Uniswap Governance Forum, tested through an offchain Snapshot temperature check, and—when they require binding protocol changes—completed through an onchain governance vote.
governanceMechanism.eli5: Think of the forum as drafting a new rule, Snapshot as the community's practice vote, and the onchain vote as the signed decision that can change the protocol.

space.name: Uniswap
space.votingPower: Delegated UNI at the proposal snapshot block
space.ballotType: Proposal-specific; the current Snapshot space does not set one global voting type
space.currentSpaceAbout: Only delegated UNI may be used to vote on proposals. A holder may delegate to themself or another address.

phases.name: Request for Comment
phases.purpose: Introduce the idea, answer questions, and revise it with community feedback.
phases.advanceRule: Move forward only when community support is clear enough to test.

phases.name: Temperature Check
phases.purpose: Measure delegated-UNI sentiment through an offchain vote.
phases.advanceRule: At least 10,000,000 UNI must vote For, and For must beat Against.

phases.name: Onchain Vote
phases.purpose: Make a binding decision and execute encoded protocol changes.
phases.advanceRule: 1,000,000 delegated UNI is required to submit; 40,000,000 UNI voting For is required to pass.

limitations: This describes the published standard process and current Snapshot space settings; an individual proposal can follow an approved expedited path or use proposal-specific ballot choices.
A Snapshot temperature check signals community support; it does not itself execute an onchain protocol change.

proposalRows.title: [Temp Check] Protocol Fee Expansion: Robinhood Chain
proposalRows.bodyExcerpt:
_This proposal is part of the protocol fee rollout, following proposals_ [_#93_](https://vote.uniswapfoundation.org/proposals/93)_,_ [_#94_](https://vote.uniswapfoundation.org/proposals/94)_,_ [_#95_](https://vote.uniswapfoundation.org/proposals/95)_, and_ [_#96_](https://vote.uniswapfoundation.org/proposals/96)_. It uses the expedited governance process_ [_approved_](https://gov.uniswap.org/t/unification-proposal/25881#p-57882-protocol-fee-rollout-4) _in UNIfication, where fee parameter update proposals can bypass the RFC stage and go directly to a five-day Snapshot followed by an onchain vote._

Since protocol fees went live on Ethereum mainnet in late December last year, the rollout has extended to ten additional chains: Arbitrum, Base, OP Mainnet, Worldchain, X Layer, Soneium, Zora, Celo, BNB Chain, and Polygon. The burn system is working as designed, with fees accumulating in TokenJ

proposalDetail.title: [Temp Check] Activate v4 Protocol Fees
proposalDetail.bodyExcerpt:
## Summary

This proposal continues the protocol fee rollout approved in UNIfication, following proposals [#93](https://vote.uniswapfoundation.org/proposals/93), [#94](https://vote.uniswapfoundation.org/proposals/94), [#95](https://vote.uniswapfoundation.org/proposals/95), and [#96](https://vote.uniswapfoundation.org/proposals/96). It uses the expedited governance process where fee parameter update proposals go directly to a five-day Snapshot followed by an onchain vote.

Protocol fees are now live across all v2 and v3 pools on 11 chains - Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Celo, OP Mainnet, Soneium, X Layer, Worldchain, Zora, BNB Chain, and Polygon. Last month, the protocol set a record burning [186,000 UNI in one day](https://x.com/UNIBurnBot/status/2063252718043459633).

Below we introduce a system for v4 protocol fees and propose to activate it on a subset of v4 pools on these same chains.

-

omittedAnalytics.topVoters: Canonical source-aware ranking is not materialized on staging; PR #239 is still Draft.
omittedAnalytics.typicalPowerDistribution: Current fixed raw power buckets are not a canonical source-aware contract.
omittedAnalytics.concentration: Current staging value is pre-PR #239 and intentionally omitted from the redesign.
omittedAnalytics.proposalCreators: Current staging proposer coverage is zero.

typicalPower.basis: average voting power per voted proposal

voterAnalytics.materializationStatus: merged backend contract; staging rebuild pending
voterAnalytics.derivedFrom: staging latest serving votes + merged buildDaoVoterRanking

observedPowerConcentration.purpose: Share of all latest-effective Snapshot VP cast across indexed proposals, ranked by each address total.
observedPowerConcentration.limitation: Observed governance participation, not current token holdings or delegated balance.

proposalCreators.basis: Snapshot author for the 102 backend-indexed proposal IDs
proposalCreators.materializationStatus: serving proposer_id pending staging source sync/rebuild
limitations: 94 source proposals are not yet indexed in staging
creator shares use the 102 currently indexed proposals only
